inputs.label: Number of Original Dimensions
inputs.businessContext: Total number of features or variables in the original dataset.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of features or variables in the original dataset.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Orijinal veri kümesindeki toplam özellik veya değişken sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Merkmale oder Variablen im ursprünglichen Datensatz.

inputs.label: Eigenvalue Decay Rate
inputs.businessContext: Rate at which eigenvalues decrease in a geometric progression model (0 < r < 1).

businessContext_i18n.en: Rate at which eigenvalues decrease in a geometric progression model (0 < r < 1).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geometrik dizi modelinde özdeğerlerin azalma hızı (0 < r < 1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Rate, mit der Eigenwerte in einem geometrischen Progressionsmodell abnehmen (0 < r < 1).

inputs.label: Cumulative Variance Threshold
inputs.businessContext: Target proportion of total variance to be retained (0 to 1).

businessContext_i18n.en: Target proportion of total variance to be retained (0 to 1).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Korunacak toplam varyansın hedef oranı (0 ile 1 arasında).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zielanteil der Gesamtvarianz, der beibehalten werden soll (0 bis 1).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
